findings.message: Non-goal is self-contradictory: it says changing `wrangler.toml` KV namespace bindings is out of scope, but the same document requires adding KV bindings for F3/F4 (lines 54, 74, 126, 326, 344). This creates planning ambiguity.

F6 goal says to add TTL to KV writes in `catalogDraftContractClient`, but evidence in the same doc correctly states that client uses HTTP to an external contract (lines 82, 88, 114, 147, 216). The goal statement is incorrect for this codebase boundary and will mis-scope implementation.

KV binding guidance is technically wrong: KV namespaces are not declared in `[vars]` / `[env.preview.vars]`; they must be declared via `[[kv_namespaces]]` (and preview env equivalent). Following this instruction would break runtime binding resolution.

The inference that `NEXT_PUBLIC_XA_UPLOADER_R2_UPLOAD_URL` implies server-side R2 binding availability is weak; that env var only proves a client upload URL exists, not Worker bucket binding for server-side job artifact storage.
